description.short: Calculate the compound annual growth rate (CAGR) over time.

short_i18n.en: Calculate the compound annual growth rate (CAGR) over time.

short_i18n.es: Calcular la tasa de crecimiento anual compuesta (CAGR) a lo largo del tiempo.
